summary: Taiki has flipped bullish in his most recent video, explicitly claiming 'The Bottom Is In' and forecasting higher BTC prices.
narrative: After spending late 2025 aggressively shorting Ethereum and advising capital preservation, his latest analysis (March 2026) argues that the market has bottomed. He points to potential catalysts like STRC and critiques standard cycle theories to support his new thesis that prices are ready to move higher.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
